name: Chunky Cinnamon Applesauce
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Cooking apples; peel and core
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the apples and water in a saucepan over medium heat until boiling.
2. Reduce the heat to maintain a simmer. Simmer uncovered for 10 to 15 minutes, stirring frequently to break up the apples and cook until tender.
3. Stir in the brown sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Return to a boil and continue cooking for 1 minute.
4. Serve warm or cold. Cover and refrigerate for up to 2 days or freeze for up to 2 months.
